usage.label: Plan usage: unavailable (not machine-readable) — not a fabricated number.
usage.plan_pct_source: UNAVAILABLE — no machine-readable live plan-usage signal on this box with zero burn. Only static labels exist (subscriptionType / rateLimitTier); the real source is the OAuth account-usage endpoint / anthropic-ratelimit-* headers, which are not persisted to disk. Wind-down MUST NOT fire on a fabricated number — pass a real reading via write_usage_state(plan_pct=...) to populate this, or wire the endpoint. Today the mechanical wind-down runs on the wall-clock session budget in ops/scout/session_budget.py, not on this %.
